DECLARATION OF THOMAS P. CAREY'S IN SUPPORT OF OPPOS TO MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTEGRATED CLEANING SOLUTIONS, INC.
REPLY TO OPPOS RE: MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT LEFT BANK - MENLO PARK
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-08-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT LEFT BANK-MENLO PARK'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. LATE OPPOSITION HAS BEEN CONSIDERED. PLAINTIFF'S LATE UNVERIFIED RESPONSES ARE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE THE ADEQUACY OF THOSE RESPONSES ON THIS MOTION. VERIFICATIONS SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $740. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-15-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Elton Jay Blum, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Left Bank-Menlo Park
Thomas Patrick Carey, Esq., for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Integrated Cleaning Solutions

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant Left Bank-Menlo Park's Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories is granted. Late opposition has been considered. Plaintiff's late unverified responses are a misuse of the discovery process. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. Verifications shall be made within 10 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $740. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2009 Set For Trial On May-18-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-18-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. (212)
